queries.name: Q18
queries.sql: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, SUM(l_quantity) FROM customer, orders, lineitem WHERE o_orderkey IN ( SELECT l_orderkey FROM lineitem GROUP BY l_orderkey HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300 ) AND c_custkey = o_custkey AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey GROUP BY c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice ORDER BY o_totalprice DESC, o_orderdate LIMIT 100;
